name: dev-tools-skills
description: All-in-one development toolkit: universal project init (dt:init), study assistant (dt:study), git push (dt:push), serial command execution loop (dt:execute-loop), plugin management (dt:update-remote-plugins), code annotation (dt:code-note), Cloudflare tunnel (dt:to-public-cloudflare), project-local skill lifecycle management (dt:project-skills), work report generator (dt:work-report), local worktree isolation (dt:local-worktree), Android tools (adt:*), and Flutter tools (fdt:*).
